title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Maersk India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Maersk India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Logistics Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
